description_long: This is a vintage-style tractor with a large, rectangular wooden cargo compartment mounted on its rear, featuring ornate black text and decorative flourishes on the side panels. The front of the vehicle is constructed from rust-colored metal, with a classic, exposed engine compartment, round headlights, and a prominent vertical grille. The wheels are spoked and rimmed with metal, with the rear wheels slightly larger than the front, and both sets featuring a wooden appearance. The cargo box is reinforced with metal bands and has a small circular window at the rear, as well as visible bolts and hinges. The text on the cargo box reads 'BOŞ İŞLER MÜDÜRÜ' on the sides and 'ANTİN KUNTİN ŞEYLER' on the back, suggesting a whimsical or humorous theme. The overall design combines elements of early 20th-century utility vehicles with a rustic, handcrafted aesthetic.
description: A vintage tractor with a large wooden cargo box, ornate text, and spoked metal-rimmed wheels, featuring a rust-colored metal front and decorative details.
description_view_0: Side view showing the ornate text 'BOŞ İŞLER MÜDÜRÜ' on the wooden cargo box and the spoked wheels.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the rust-colored metal hood, round headlights, and vertical grille.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with similar features to view 0, showing the cargo box and spoked wheels.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the text 'ANTİN KUNTİN ŞEYLER' and a small circular window on the cargo box.
attribute_wheel_configuration: four wheels, rear wheels slightly larger, likely two-wheel drive
attribute_cabin_design: Open cabin with partial metal enclosure, no visible windows or doors, minimal ergonomic features
